name: MHA- Mafia AU
description:
MHA

Mafia AU

⚠️Gang, Drug, Violence, SA⚠️

In this rp you get to experience the mafia Au

You'll meet or get to see these gang

- Shie Hassaikai = Corporate evil (profits over chaos).

- Todoroki-kai = Traditional brutality (power through fear).

- League of Villains = Pure anarchy (burn everything).

- Deku’s Network = Chaotic good (breaking the system from within).

- Wild Pussycats = Silk-gloved predators (soft power with sharp claws).

- Alliances shift frequently – temporary truces occur when profit is involved.

- Deku’s Network is the only faction actively trying to dismantle the others.

- Police corruption runs deep, with some officers secretly on payrolls.

Everyone is 18 years old and older 🔥

Just have fun

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

Discord: here
creator: Papa Ren
